description: Machine-readable capability registry for routed surfaces. This is the authority for concrete tool/skill/agent/command/workflow relations; provider overlays should reference it rather than duplicating route tables.

semantic_review_policy.lifecycle_next_phase: Introduce lifecycle_state and archive/superseded modeling after historical records and knowledge are cleaned up.

notes: Structured registry relations remain the authority for concrete wiring.
Deterministic structural relations may be synchronized locally from workflow/agent/command surfaces.
Semantic relation extraction should use remote api-gpt oss, not local embedding heuristics.
Capability embeddings should use the local embedding stack only.
Semantic relation suggestions are for discoverability improvement only, not for speculative orchestration expansion.
Only documented and clearly bounded relations should be accepted from semantic suggestion review.
Embeddings are discovery aids only; they must not become the source of truth for capability routing.
When capability entities or relations change, the system should either auto-refresh indexes or leave an explicit pending reminder.

pending_actions.summary: Deterministic relation sync is implemented via capability_registry.py sync-relations.
pending_actions.recommended_trigger: After registry updates or when new routed surfaces are added.

pending_actions.summary: Capability embeddings built via capability_registry.py sync-embeddings using qwen3-embedding:4b.
pending_actions.recommended_trigger: Before relying on semantic capability discovery.

pending_actions.summary: Remote semantic relation extraction is implemented via semantic_relation_extractor.py using GPT_OSS_ENDPOINT / GPT_OSS_API_KEY and capability_registry.py export-semantic-relations.
pending_actions.recommended_trigger: When semantic or inferred capability relations should be proposed from descriptions rather than explicit route syntax.

pending_actions.summary: kb.py continues local embedding writes; capability-related KB entries are scanned into indexing_reminders.json via indexing_reminder.py for semantic relation follow-up.
pending_actions.recommended_trigger: Before expanding DB-backed registry or broader knowledge writeback automation.

relations.notes: Default PDF reading path for any project.
Escalate when standard extraction still distorts complex tables.
PLM PDF routing still reuses the shared hybrid extraction primitive.

approved semantic suggestion (SR-003): For PLM‑specific documents the command can follow the PLM PDF ingestion skill in addition to the generic PDF skill. | evidence=.claude/commands/read-pdf.md; .claude/skills-on-demand/plm-pdf-ingestion/SKILL.md | impact=Improves discoverability by surfacing the documented PLM-specific branch from the generic PDF entrypoint.
